notes: FAIL_SSN -> graph routes to LexisNexis (no esc) -> PASS.
Invalid credentials -> ERROR (config failure, not KYC fail).
Persona inquiry created (201) -> PENDING; webhook resume w/ persona_kyc_verified=TRUE -> PASSED (drive resume via /api/v1/kyc/persona/webhook-data).
ESCALATE_FULL_NAME: resume with changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology.
ESCALATE_FULL_NAME: resume with same field -> SAME_INPUT.
ESCALATE_SSN: resume with changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology.
ESCALATE_SSN: resume with same field -> SAME_INPUT.
ESCALATE_DOB: resume with changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology.
ESCALATE_DOB: resume with same field -> SAME_INPUT.
ESCALATE_ADDRESS: resume with changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology.
ESCALATE_ADDRESS: resume with same field -> SAME_INPUT.
LN non-SSN soft fail -> Persona; webhook TRUE -> KYC Pass.
LN SSN fail -> Persona pass -> SSN esc same -> Decline.
SSN esc different -> re-run IDology -> Pass.
PII esc -> re-run IDology fail -> LexisNexis pass.
Persona async create -> PENDING (webhook completes later).
Replay same flow_id 3x -> idempotent single effect.
Missing params -> USM data fetch -> params present -> proceed. (Seed only USM; user starts with no profile params.)
USM returns no params -> fetch ran but still missing -> ERROR terminal.
ERROR at retry==max_retry_per_attempt then PASS (seed is_sequence: 500, then PASS).
ESCALATE_* trigger -> park PENDING + EscalationLog opened.
next_step over max_step_attempts on re-entry -> ERROR terminal (boundary max+1).
VALIDATED success: valid envelope+user+flow -> flow created & PASSED.
Duplicate flow_id replay -> KYC_FLOW_COMPLETED on 2nd call; single uks_kyc_flow row.
flow_id idempotency replay -> one row, idology called once.
Concurrent bombard same flow_id -> UNIQUE holds, no dup.
Near-SLA latency ~800ms, under timeout_ms -> still PASS (slow class, response delayed).
Slow ~25s but < 30s timeout cap -> PASS (boundary 'max', just under timeout). Contrast IDO-13/TC-016 timeout.
LexisNexis slow but under timeout -> PASS. Contrast LN-TMO/TC-019.
